meta.consolidationNote: This master layer does not convert EUR and USD automatically. Any aggregate is informational only until an FX layer is defined.

alerts.title: Daily update model is data-first
alerts.message: After XTB close screenshots, update only the JSON files inside the data folder before committing.

alerts.title: Consolidation is not currency-converted
alerts.message: Do not treat EUR and USD totals as directly additive until a formal FX rule is introduced.
